should_record.what: Staging deploy migration failures are caused by the migration runner using a read-only database role; DDL silently fails and the schema drifts. Production uses the owner role.
Platform runbook for granting the migration runner a dedicated DDL role: https://example.com/platform/runbooks/staging-migration-role — needed every time a new environment is brought up.

should_not_record.what: User asked 'Where is the role configured?' mid-diagnosis.
should_not_record.reason: transient question during debugging, answered inline; not standalone knowledge
